memoryArtifacts.headline: Le Blount Family, in Letitia S. La Roche, North Carolina Society of Colonial Dames of America, Application for Membership, 20 April 1900, Page 7
memoryArtifacts.description:
In 1900, Letitia S. LaRoche (nee Letitia Gamble Shepard) applied for membership in the North Carolina Society of Colonial Dames of America.

This is an excerpt from an 8 page "Application for Membership of Mrs. Letitia S. La Roche, Dated April 20, 1900, Elected June 6, 1900."

It is probably not all accurate.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Odingsells於1202年12月14日出生在英國盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德時，她的父親Hugh de Odingsells30歲，母親Basilia Limesi43歲。她和Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham至少有4個兒子。她去世於1246年3月9日在她的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Odingsells was born on 14 December 1202, in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England, her father, Hugh de Odingsells, was 30 and her mother, Basilia Limesi, was 43. She had at least 4 sons with Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham. She died on 9 March 1246, in her hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England.

fr.Of, Belton, Rutland, England: Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Odingsells est née le 14 décembre 1202, à Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Odingsells, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Basilia Limesi, avait 43 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham. Elle est décédée le 9 mars 1246, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Angleterre.

de.Of, Belton, Rutland, England: Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Odingsells am 14. Dezember 1202 in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Odingsells 30 und ihre Mutter Basilia Limesi 43. Sie hatte mit Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 9. März 1246 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham. Morì il 9 marzo 1246, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Odingsellsが1202年12月14日にイギリスルトランドベルトン イン ルトランドで生まれた時，父Hugh de Odingsellsは30歳，母Basilia Limesiは43歳であった。彼女はRobert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlinghamとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1246年3月9日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスルトランドベルトン イン ルトランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Of, Belton, Rutland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Odingsells(이)가 1202년 12월 14일 영국 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Odingsells(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Basilia Limesi(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 3월 9일 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.Of, Belton, Rutland, England: Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Odingsells nasceu em 14 de dezembro de 1202, em Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Odingsells, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Basilia Limesi, tinha 43 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham. Ela faleceu em 9 de março de 1246, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inglaterra.

ru.Of, Belton, Rutland, England: белтон ин рутланд, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Odingsells родилась 14 декабря 1202 г. в местности белтон ин рутланд, рутланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Odingsells было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilia Limesi, 43. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham. Она умерла 9 марта 1246 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности белтон ин рутланд, рутланд, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1246, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Inglaterra.
